Off Calendar Jun-10-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted the tentative rulings as follow: 1) DEFENDANT MANKE LUMBER COMPANY, INC.'S Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff Erika Mccartney And Her Attorney, Robert B. Hancock In The Sum Of $1,295.00 For Costs And Attorney Fees [Ccp §§ 2023.010, 2023.030; And 2030.300 ] is granted as to Special Interrogatories 1,3,6,9,12,13 and 15. The Motion is denied as to Interrogatories 16 and 17. It is not clear whether the determination of privilege, and whether certain individuals are experts in this regard, is before the court on this motion. The motion is denied without prejudice as to that issue. No sanctions. The prevailing party is to prepare the order.
2) DEFENDANT MANKE LUMBER COMPANY, INC.'S Motion To Compel Further Response And Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff Erika Mccartney And Her Attorney Robert B. Hancock In The Sum Of $1,295.00 [Ccp §§ 2023.010, 2023.030 is denied as to RFP's 1 through 6 and 8-9 if a privilege log has been produced. The motion is denied as to RFP 7. It is not clear whether the determination of privilege, and whether certain individuals are experts in this regard, is before the court on this motion. The motion is denied without prejudice as to that issue. No sanctions. The prevailing party is to preapre the order.

Judge Pro Tem: Thomas Cohen. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
